mapper.sql: `group`, own_user, supervisor_token, worker_token, user_token, dev_users, alert_recipients, alert_webhook, worker_context_path
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sched_group ( `group`, own_user, updated_by, created_by ) VALUES ( #{group,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ownUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sched_group WHERE `group` = #{group,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sched_group SET ${type}_token = #{newToken,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_by = #{updatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = version+1 WHERE `group` = #{group,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ${type}_token = #{oldToken,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sched_group SET own_user = #{ownUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_by = #{updatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = version+1 WHERE `group` = #{group,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sched_group SET is_deleted = id, updated_by = #{updatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = version+1 WHERE `group` = #{group,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE sched_group SET own_user = #{ownUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dev_users = #{devUsers,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, alert_recipients = #{alertRecipients,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, alert_webhook = #{alertWebhook,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, worker_context_path = #{workerContextPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_by = #{updatedBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = version+1 WHERE `group` = #{group,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sched_group WHERE `group` = #{group,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND is_deleted = 0 ) e

SELECT FROM sched_group
ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
